insight: The EMEA sales team is showing a solid win rate of 60%, contributing to a total won revenue of $455,000 for the period. The standout strength lies in the impressive average deal size of $151,667, suggesting our ability to secure high-value contracts. However, the average discount of 7.6% is a concern, as it could erode margins over time if not addressed. To maintain profitability, I recommend the VP initiate a review of discounting practices and establish tighter guidelines to ensure we preserve margin integrity while pursuing new deals this week.
